rdataset 1.0.0
  • Reference

get_sequence_report

Source: R/RcppExports.R
get_sequence_report.Rd

Get sequence report data: starts, ends, lengths, ambigs, longest homopolymers and numns.

get_sequence_report(data)

Arguments

data

an Rcpp::XPtr<Dataset> pointer to an instance of the 'Dataset' c++ class.

Value

data.frame

Examples


 dataset <- new_dataset("miseq_sop", 4)
 sequences <- read_fasta(rdataset_example("final.fasta"))
 add_sequences(dataset, sequences$sequence_names, sequences$sequences, "")
#> [1] 2425
 get_sequence_report(dataset)
